articles.author: Ivan Mehta
articles.title: SpeakOn’s dictation device is a good idea marred by platform limitations - TechCrunch
articles.description: This $129 device uses MagSafe to stick on the back of an iPhone to power transcription across apps
articles.content: I constantly use dictation apps such as Wispr Flow, Willow, or Typeless to reply to messages and emails on both my Mac and my phone. But to do so, I have to use my phone’s mic or AirPods to dictate m… [+4187 chars]

articles.author: Jeran Wittenstein, Ryan Vlastelica
articles.title: Big Tech’s $16 Trillion Earnings Week Is Make-Or-Break for Rally - Bloomberg
articles.description: Wall Street’s biggest technology stocks have carried the S&P 500 to record highs even as the war in Iran continues. Now, earnings from a handful of them this week will give investors a read on whether this rally’s sustainable.
articles.content: Wall Streets biggest technology stocks have carried the S&P 500 to record highs even as the war in Iran continues. Now, earnings from a handful of them this week will give investors a read on whe… [+292 chars]
